# Sedifex Developer Docs

> Canonical docs for Sedifex developer integrations.

## Core pages
- Home: https://developer.sedifex.com/
- Quickstart: https://developer.sedifex.com/quickstart.html
- API reference: https://developer.sedifex.com/api-reference.html
- Webhooks: https://developer.sedifex.com/webhooks.html
- Guides: https://developer.sedifex.com/guides.html
- Troubleshooting: https://developer.sedifex.com/troubleshooting.html

## Crawling
- robots: https://developer.sedifex.com/robots.txt
- sitemap: https://developer.sedifex.com/sitemap.xml
